channel.title: Policy & Security Think Tank Updates
channel.description: Custom RSS feed from CSIS, CFR, and other policy institutions

item.title: States Weekly: April 8, 2026
item.description: This edition of States Weekly covers April 8, 2026.

item.title: The U.S. Trade Deficit Did Not Shrink—It Moved to Vietnam and Taiwan
item.description: One year after Liberation Day, theU.S.-China trade war has reshaped the geography of U.S. trade deficitswithout reducing their scale.

item.title: The Fragile U.S.-Iran Ceasefire: Issues to Watch
item.description: A fragile ceasefire masks a far more dangerous reality: Iran’s nuclear ambitions unresolved, Lebanon destabilized, terrorism risks rising, and a shadow war between Israel and Iran poised to reignite at any moment.

item.title: Chile: New Directions and Uncertainty with a Strong Security Partner
item.description: CSIS Americas Program Senior Associate Evan Ellis analyzes Chilean President Jose Antonio Kast's new public security agenda and military reforms.

item.title: Where Is the Space Force Budget for Commercial Services?
item.description: The U.S. Space Force has emphasized the need to integrate and use commercial space services for years, yet the proposed fiscal year 2027 budget does not show a strong sign that funding will match the rhetoric.
